[[File:Garnib1.jpg|thumb|left|250px]]
'''Garnib''' was the primary [[Planet/Legends|world]] of the [[Garnib system/Legends|Garnib system]]. It was subjugated by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and many native [[Balinaka]] (considered to be [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy's]] most artistic beings) were exported as slaves to the breeding farms on [[Karfeddion/Legends|Karfeddion]]. The planet was headquarters of [[Galactic Crystal Creations]], which exported [[Garnib crystal]]s.

It was a cold world covered in frigid oceans and glaciers.

Garnib was also the adopted world of the [[Vernol]] species who emigrated when their homeworld shifted in its orbit and become uninhabitable.

{{Planet-stub}}
